coreFlow: Create or import an architectural plan, edit it in 2D, inspect the generated 3D model, run decision-support analysis, and export a governed project package.

deployment.evidence: PR #123 head deployment is green; exact-head production certification remains the merge gate

knownLimitations: Compliance, approval and cost outputs are decision-support rather than certified determinations.
PR #123 must not merge until the exact head SHA passes the complete production certification workflow.
Some collaboration and enterprise integration paths remain preview or planned.

nextMilestone: Complete exact-head certification for PR #123, merge the single release candidate, verify production, freeze the release branch and tag v1.5.0.
